Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.webhook

Class WebhookDefinition

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.webhook.WebhookDefinition
public final class WebhookDefinition extends Object
Webhook endpoint definition.

These are loaded from Config.yml under Webhooks.Definitions.*

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructs a webhook definition.

  • Constructor Details

    • WebhookDefinition

      public WebhookDefinition(String id, boolean enabled, String url, WebhookHttpMethod method, String contentType, int timeoutMs, boolean handleDiscordRateLimits, Map<String,String> headers, WebhookSignatureConfig signature, boolean retryEnabled, int retryMaxAttempts, long retryBackoffMs, long retryMaxBackoffMs)
      Constructs a webhook definition.
      Parameters:
      id - id/key of this webhook definition
      enabled - whether this definition is enabled
      url - webhook URL
      method - HTTP method
      contentType - request content type (usually application/json)
      timeoutMs - request timeout in milliseconds
      handleDiscordRateLimits - whether to use Discord retry_after for HTTP 429
      headers - extra headers (values may contain placeholders)
      signature - signature config (optional)
      retryEnabled - whether retry is enabled
      retryMaxAttempts - max attempts including the first attempt
      retryBackoffMs - initial backoff in milliseconds
      retryMaxBackoffMs - maximum backoff in milliseconds

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      definition id

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Returns:
      true if enabled

    • getUrl

      public String getUrl()
      Returns:
      webhook URL

    • getMethod

      public WebhookHttpMethod getMethod()
      Returns:
      HTTP method

    • getContentType

      public String getContentType()
      Returns:
      content type

    • getTimeoutMs

      public int getTimeoutMs()
      Returns:
      timeout in milliseconds

    • isHandleDiscordRateLimits

      public boolean isHandleDiscordRateLimits()
      Returns:
      true if Discord 429 retry_after handling is enabled

    • getHeaders

      public Map<String,String> getHeaders()
      Returns:
      extra headers (unmodifiable)

    • getSignature

      public WebhookSignatureConfig getSignature()
      Returns:
      signature config (may be null)

      public boolean isRetryEnabled()
      Returns:
      true if retry is enabled

      public int getRetryMaxAttempts()
      Returns:
      max attempts

    • getRetryBackoffMs

      public long getRetryBackoffMs()
      Returns:
      initial backoff in ms

    • getRetryMaxBackoffMs

      public long getRetryMaxBackoffMs()
      Returns:
      max backoff in ms

    • safeUrlForLog

      public String safeUrlForLog()
      Returns a safe URL string for logs (removes sensitive token segments).
      Returns:
      sanitized URL for logging

    • getLastRetryAfterMs

      public long getLastRetryAfterMs()
      Returns:
      retry_after in ms, or 0 if none

    • setLastRetryAfterMs

      public void setLastRetryAfterMs(long lastRetryAfterMs)
      Parameters:
      lastRetryAfterMs - retry delay in ms
